workflow_steps.name: scroll_to_candidate_activity
workflow_steps.description: Scroll down until the Candidate Activity section is visible

workflow_steps.name: click_registration_link
workflow_steps.description: Click the NEET registration link under Candidate Activity
workflow_steps.prompt: Click the bullet point link under the 'Candidate Activity' heading that contains 'Registration' and 'NEET' (e.g. 'Registration for NEET(UG) - 2026' or 'Re-opening of Registration for NEET')

workflow_steps.name: click_new_registration
workflow_steps.description: Scroll down then click 'New Registration' button in the center card
workflow_steps.prompt: In the center card (middle of the three boxes), click the blue button at the bottom that says 'New Registration >>'

workflow_steps.name: scroll_to_declaration
workflow_steps.description: Scroll down to the declaration checkbox on the instructions page

workflow_steps.name: accept_declaration
workflow_steps.description: Check the declaration checkbox
workflow_steps.target: I have downloaded the Information Bulletin of NEET (UG) 2026

workflow_steps.name: click_proceed
workflow_steps.description: Click 'Click here to Proceed' button

workflow_steps.name: fill_personal_details
workflow_steps.description: Fill Personal Details section

fields.label: Candidate Name
fields.prompt: In the Personal Details section (व्यक्तिगत विवरण), find the first text input - the one for 'Candidate Name' or 'अभ्यर्थी का नाम' - click it, clear it, and type '{value}'

fields.label: Father / Guardian Name
fields.prompt: In the Personal Details section, find the text input for 'Father / Guardian Name' or 'पिता / अभिभावक का नाम', click it, clear it, and type '{value}'

fields.label: Mother / Guardian Name
fields.prompt: In the Personal Details section, find the text input for 'Mother / Guardian Name' or 'माता / अभिभावक का नाम', click it, clear it, and type '{value}'

fields.label: Candidate's Date of Birth Day
fields.prompt: In the Personal Details section, find the row 'Candidate Date of Birth' (अभ्यर्थी की जन्म तिथि). The LEFTMOST of the three dropdowns is for Day — it shows placeholder '-Day-'. Click that first dropdown to open it, then select the option that displays the number '{value}' (day of month).

fields.label: Candidate's Date of Birth Month
fields.prompt: In the Candidate Date of Birth row, click the second dropdown (Month / --Month--) and select '{value}'

fields.label: Candidate's Date of Birth Year
fields.prompt: In the Candidate Date of Birth row, click the third dropdown (Year / --Year--) and select '{value}'

fields.label: Gender
fields.prompt: Click the Gender (लिंग) dropdown and select '{value}'

workflow_steps.name: fill_confirm_personal_details
workflow_steps.description: Fill Confirm Personal Details section (re-enter same values)

fields.label: Confirm Candidate Name
fields.prompt: In the 'Confirm Personal Details' section, find the first text input - 'Confirm Candidate Name' or 'अभ्यर्थी के नाम की पुष्टि करें' - click it, clear it, and type '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Father / Guardian Name
fields.prompt: In Confirm Personal Details, find the input for 'Confirm Father / Guardian Name', click it, clear it, and type '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Mother / Guardian Name
fields.prompt: In Confirm Personal Details, find the input for 'Confirm Mother / Guardian Name', click it, clear it, and type '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Date of Birth Day
fields.prompt: In the Confirm Personal Details section, find the row for Confirm Date of Birth. The LEFTMOST of the three dropdowns is for Day (placeholder '-Day-'). Click that first dropdown to open it, then select the option that displays the number '{value}'.

fields.label: Confirm Date of Birth Month
fields.prompt: In the 'Confirm Date of Birth' row (under 'Confirm Personal Details'), click the second dropdown labeled '--Month--' and select '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Date of Birth Year
fields.prompt: In the 'Confirm Date of Birth' row (under 'Confirm Personal Details'), click the third dropdown labeled '--Year--' and select '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Gender
fields.prompt: In the Confirm Personal Details section, find the dropdown for 'Confirm Gender' or 'लिंग की पुष्टि करें' and select '{value}'.

workflow_steps.name: fill_present_address
workflow_steps.description: Fill Present Address section

fields.label: Premises No/ Name
fields.prompt: Under the Present Address section, find the FIRST text input next to 'पता – पंक्ति 1 (Address Line 1)' and type '{value}'

fields.label: Locality
fields.prompt: Under the Present Address section, find the SECOND text input next to 'पता – पंक्ति 2 (Address Line 2)(Optional):' and type '{value}'

fields.label: Country
fields.prompt: Under the Present Address section, find 'देश (Country)' showing '--Select--'. Click it to open the dropdown. Do NOT scroll. Find the search or filter input inside the dropdown, click into it, type 'India', then click the option 'India' from the filtered list.

fields.label: State
fields.prompt: Under the Present Address section, find 'राज्य (State)' showing '--Select--'. Click it to open the dropdown. Do NOT scroll the list. Find the search or filter input inside the dropdown, click into it, type '{value}', then click the matching option '{value}' from the filtered/suggested list.

fields.label: District
fields.prompt: Under the Present Address section, find 'जिला (District)' showing '--Select--'. Click it to open the dropdown. Do NOT scroll. Find the search or filter input inside the dropdown, click into it, type '{value}', then click the matching option '{value}' from the filtered list.

fields.label: PIN Code
fields.prompt: Under the Present Address section, find the text input next to 'पिन कोड (PIN Code)' and type '{value}'

workflow_steps.name: fill_communication_details
workflow_steps.description: Fill Electronic Communication Address section

fields.label: Email Address
fields.prompt: Under 'Electronic Communication Address', find the input next to 'Email Address' and type '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Email Address
fields.prompt: Find the second email input box (Confirm Email Address) and type '{value}' in it.

fields.label: Mobile Number
fields.prompt: Find the larger input field next to 'Mobile Number' (the one AFTER the small '91' country code box) and type '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Mobile Number
fields.prompt: Find the larger input field next to 'Confirm Mobile Number' (the one AFTER the small '91' country code box) and type '{value}'

workflow_steps.name: same_as_present_address
workflow_steps.description: Check 'Same As Present Address' for permanent address
workflow_steps.prompt: Do not scroll. In the 'स्थायी पता (Permanent Address)' section, find the single checkbox whose label is 'वर्तमान पते के समान (Same As Present Address)'. Click directly on that checkbox (the small square input), not on the label text, to check it.

workflow_steps.name: fill_password_section
workflow_steps.description: Fill Password, Security Question and Security Answer

fields.label: Password
fields.prompt: Find the input field next to 'Password' (under 'Choose Password') and type '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Password
fields.prompt: Find the input field next to 'Confirm Password' and type '{value}'

fields.label: Security Question
fields.prompt: Click the 'Security Question' dropdown and select the first available option (not the default '--Select--')

fields.label: Security Answer
fields.prompt: Find the input field next to 'Security Answer' and type '{value}'

workflow_steps.name: solve_captcha
workflow_steps.description: Read the CAPTCHA image and fill it in

workflow_steps.name: submit_form
workflow_steps.description: Click the Submit button

error_handlers.already registered: stop:This email/phone is already registered on NEET portal

workflow_steps.name: close_review_popup
workflow_steps.description: Click CLOSE on the Review Page pop-up
workflow_steps.prompt: A pop-up titled 'Review Page !!' appears. Click the blue 'CLOSE' button on this pop-up to close it.

workflow_steps.name: verify_address_communication_checkbox
workflow_steps.description: Check 'I have verified Electronic Communication, Present and Permanent Address details submitted'
workflow_steps.target: I have verified Electronic Communication, Present and Permanent Address details submitted.

workflow_steps.name: portal_account_review_agree
workflow_steps.description: Tick the 'I Agree' declaration checkbox (then click Submit and send OTP)
workflow_steps.prompt: Find the declaration checkbox labeled 'I Agree' (below the Declaration text) and click it to check it.

workflow_steps.name: click_ok_review_alert
workflow_steps.description: Click OK on the 'review your details and confirm checkboxes' pop-up
workflow_steps.prompt: A pop-up dialog says 'Before proceeding, please review your Personal Details, Present Address, and Permanent Address and confirm them by selecting all the required checkboxes.' Click the blue 'OK' button to dismiss it.

workflow_steps.name: submit_and_send_otp
workflow_steps.description: Click the blue 'Submit and send OTP to verify Mobile Number' button
workflow_steps.target: Submit and send OTP to verify Mobile Number
workflow_steps.prompt: Click the blue button that says 'Submit and send OTP to verify Mobile Number' (do not click the grey 'EDIT Registration Form' button).

workflow_steps.name: confirm_submit_yes
workflow_steps.description: Click Yes on the 'Confirm !!' dialog (submit registration and get OTP)
workflow_steps.prompt: A confirmation dialog titled 'Confirm !!' asks 'Do you wish to submit Registration Form and Get OTP ?'. Click the blue 'Yes' button (do not click 'No').

workflow_steps.name: handle_otp
workflow_steps.description: Ask for OTP and fill it in the 6 boxes
workflow_steps.wait_reason: Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your registered mobile number and email for NEET UG verification. It will be filled into the 6 OTP input boxes on the page.

workflow_steps.name: click_verify_email_id
workflow_steps.description: Click 'Verify Email Id' in the left sidebar
workflow_steps.prompt: On this page there is a left sidebar. Under the section 'Verify Mobile No. & Email Id' find and click the link or option that says 'Verify Email Id' (Mobile No. may already show as Verified with a checkmark).

workflow_steps.name: verify_success
workflow_steps.description: Verify registration was successful
